pages.title: User Funnel | User Engagement
pages.key_finding: Although user stickiness improved (11% → 14%), the decline in Monthly Active Users indicates a shrinking overall user base, while a 55% drop-off before gameplay highlights the need to improve onboarding and retention.

pages.title: Game Performance (Score)
pages.key_finding: Game performance experienced a significant downturn, with the average daily score dropping.

pages.title: Game Performance (Time)
pages.key_finding: Player engagement time has declined significantly, indicating a critical loss of user interest.

pages.title: Most-played stages | Most-cooked menus
pages.key_finding: Users show a strong preference for 'Everyday Comfort Foods', with 'Umami Daily' being the top stage and ข้าวผัดหมู leading the menu choices, suggesting future content should focus on familiar, daily recipes.
